items.name: Sokany SK-4009 4-in-1 Slow Juice Extractor
items.description: One Machine, Four Jobs Done Right. An 800W powerhouse that juices, grinds beans, and grinds meat with one motor. One-key rotation with two gears keeps operation simple, and the 304 stainless steel blade is built for durability and precision. Perfect for households that want a juicer, grinder, and mini food prep station without buying three separate machines.

items.name: Sokany SK-01005 Slow Juicer
items.description: Nutrient-Rich Juice, the Slow Way. Designed for health and nutrition with fine grinding capabilities, letting you enjoy fresh juices like watermelon, orange, and dragon fruit. Runs on an 800W motor at a steady 75rpm with a wide feed chute for easy loading, plus overheat protection and automatic shutdown for safety.

items.name: Sokany SK-03031 Multi-Purpose Blender (2-in-1)
items.description: 5 Speeds. 2 Jobs. Zero Compromise. An 800W motor with 7025 copper-aluminum alloy construction and temperature control, offering 2-in-1 functionality — blending cup plus grinder — in a 1.5L large glass cup with 5 adjustable speed settings. Smoothies one minute, ground coffee the next.

items.name: Sokany SK-03041 Multi-Purpose Blender (2-in-1)
items.description: Everyday Blending, Built Solid. A dependable jug blender with a 1.6-litre jug and sleek black housing, ideal for smoothies, sauces, and other everyday kitchen jobs, with simple, reliable mechanical controls. The practical daily-use option in the lineup.

items.name: Sokany SK-03080 Multi-Purpose Blender
items.description: Compact Power for Every Kitchen. Part of Sokany's multi-purpose blender family — stainless steel blades, multi-speed control, built for the everyday mix of smoothies, sauces, and light grinding jobs. The budget-friendly pick for anyone just starting to kit out their kitchen.

items.name: Luma Bella LB-53021 Multipurpose Blender
items.description: Sleek Blending, Everyday Price. A 1.5-litre blender with a grinder attachment for versatile kitchen use, in a compact, stylish housing that's easy to store and clean. A great value pick for first-time buyers.

items.name: Sokany SK-5111 Electric Stove
items.description: Portable Power, Any Countertop. A compact single-plate electric hot stove — stainless-steel styling that's stylish and easy to clean, with adjustable temperature control for everyday cooking. Perfect as a backup burner, for students, or for small kitchens needing extra cooking space.

items.name: Sokany SK-07066 Premium Egg Boiler
items.description: Perfect Eggs, Every Single Time. A quick, no-fuss egg boiler that takes the guesswork out of breakfast — consistent results with minimal cleanup, ideal for busy mornings.

bundles.name: Sokany Breakfast Starter Pack
bundles.description: Egg Boiler + Electric Stove. Everything you need for quick, easy mornings.

bundles.name: Complete Kitchen Kit
bundles.description: Slow Juicer + Multi-Purpose Blender + Electric Stove. A full kitchen setup in one pack — juice, blend, and cook, covered.
